_doc: Phase-6 proof-floor: 3-commit good->drift->regress synthetic bisect smoke. C0 is good baseline, C1 is allowlisted drift (timestamp/qemu_version-class noise that the cross-host allowlist absorbs), C2 is the regressing commit. The bisect tool MUST identify C2 as first_bad and record C1 as drift, NOT as the regression.

commits._note: real regression: missing marker in trace
